title: Requirement prioritization in Software Engineering: a systematic literature review update
author: Ais, Renato Cesar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A data extraction form was developed to collect all relevant information from the identified studies and organize the selection process in this updated systematic literature review. The main information included in this form comprises the protocol, an identifier (ID) for each study, bibliographic references, and answers to the research questions.
steps_raw: A data extraction form was developed to collect all relevant information from the identified studies and organize the selection process in this updated systematic literature review.
